political.s: FEC: $490K in executive political donations; partisan lean split across 12 executive donors.

charity.s: $18M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.01% of revenue) via American Honda Foundation.

environment.s: air pollution violation: $18.3M in federal penalties (Violation Tracker).

privacy.s: State regulator action: CalPrivacy (most recent 2025-03-12). Honda Settles with CPPA Over Privacy Violations

wiki.extract: Honda Motor Co., Ltd., commonly known as Honda, is a Japanese multinational conglomerate automotive manufacturer headquartered at the Toranomon Alcea Tower in Toranomon, Minato, Tokyo, Japan.

topHazards.label: The improperly manufactured camshafts in the engines can cause the starter rope to suddenly retract when pulling to start, posing an injury hazard.
The handlebar's clamp can unexpectedly cause the handlebar to rotate, posing a risk of serious injury or death due to a crash hazard.
The recalled accessory heaters can overheat and catch fire, posing fire and burn hazards to consumers.
The grip can detach from the handlebar, posing crash and injury hazards.
The fuel filler cap can improperly seal, resulting in fuel and/or fuel vapor leaking, posing a fire hazard.

sampleRecalls.title: American Honda Motor Recalls Off-Road Motorcycles Due to Risk of Serious Injury or Death Due to Crash Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves model year 2025-2026 Honda off-road motorcycles with model numbers CRF250R/RX/RWE or CRF450R/RX/RWE. The model number can be found on the front of the bike in white letters. The white Honda logo is printed on both sides of the back of the motorcycle. The motorcycles have a red chassis. The vehicle…
hazards: The handlebar's clamp can unexpectedly cause the handlebar to rotate, posing a risk of serious injury or death due to a crash hazard.
injuries: The firm has received one report of a crash. No injuries have been reported.
products: Model Year 2025-2026 CRF250R/RX/RWE and CRF450R/RX/RWE Off-Road Motorcycles
units: About 12,600 (In addition, about six were sold in Canada)

sampleRecalls.title: Honda Recalls Accessory Heaters for Side-by-Side Vehicles Due to Fire and Burn Hazards
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves accessory heaters that are compatible with model years 2023-2025 Honda Pioneer 700 (SXS700), 2022-2024 Pioneer 1000 (SXS1000), and 2022-2024 Talon 1000 (SXS1000S) vehicles. The accessory heaters were sold separately from the vehicles. Affected vehicles have been fitted with the Honda accessory hea…
hazards: The recalled accessory heaters can overheat and catch fire, posing fire and burn hazards to consumers.
injuries: Honda has received three reports of the recalled accessory heaters overheating, including two incidents resulting in fires and vehicle damage. No injuries have been reported.
products: Accessory Heaters for Model Years 2022-2024 Honda Pioneer 1000, 2023-2025 Pioneer 700, and 2022-2024 Honda Talon 1000 S…

sampleRecalls.title: American Honda Motor Recalls Off-Road Motorcycles Due to Crash and Injury Hazards
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves model year 2023-2024 Honda off-road motorcycles with model numbers CRF50F, CRF110F, and CRF125F. The CRF50F and CRF110F models were sold in red or white colors. The CRF125F was sold in red color. All three models have "HONDA" printed on the seats, and the model number printed on the motorcycle fra…
hazards: The grip can detach from the handlebar, posing crash and injury hazards.
injuries: The firm has received one report of a crash, resulting in a knee injury.

sampleRecalls.title: American Honda Motor Expands Recall of Lawnmowers and Pressure Washer Engines to include Lawnmower Replacement Engines Due to Injury Hazard; Additional Units/Injuries Reported
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Honda HRN216 and HRX217K6 lawnmowers, and GCV170/200 G5B general-purpose engines used in power washers and lawnmower replacement engines. The gas-fueled walk-behind lawnmowers are red and black with "HONDA" written on the clipping collection bag. The model and serial number are printed on a label …
hazards: The improperly manufactured camshafts in the engines can cause the starter rope to suddenly retract when pulling to start, posing an injury hazard.
injuries: Honda has received 2,966 reports of incidents related to camshaft failures since the last recall, in addition to the 2,197 reported incidents in the September 2023 recall, including 38 reports of min…
products: Honda Lawnmowers, Replacement Engines, and Pressure Washers Engines
units: About 200 additional lawnmower replacement engines (About 391,800 Lawnmowers and Pressure Washers Engines were previously recalled in September 2023)

sampleRecalls.title: American Honda Motor Recalls Lawnmowers and Pressure Washer Engines Due to Injury Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves Honda HRN216 and HRX217K6 lawnmowers and the GCV170/200 G5B pressure washer engines. The gas-fueled walk-behind lawn mowers are red and black with "HONDA" written on the clipping collection bag. The model and serial number are printed on a label located on the upper rear of the mower deck. The pre…
hazards: The improperly manufactured camshafts in the engines can cause the starter rope to suddenly retract when pulling to start, posing an injury hazard.
injuries: Honda has received 2,197 reports of incidents related to camshaft failures, including seven reports of minor injuries.
products: Honda Lawnmowers and Pressure Washer Engines

sampleRecords.employer: Honda Development and Manufacturing of America East Liberty Auto Plant
sampleRecords.event_description: Struck by running powered equipment  during maintenance, cleaning, testing
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was repairing a conveyor chain. The employee was putting the chain on a sprocket when the chain slipped and pinched their left index finger, resulting in a partial fingertip amputation.

sampleRecords.event_description: Pedestrian struck by vehicle in nonroadway area  unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was walking in the parking lot when they were struck by a commercial vehicle. The employee sustained a fractured hip and road rash.

sampleRecords.nature: Closed trauma involving internal organs, major blood vessels
sampleRecords.event_description: Fall on same level due to slip or trip
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was walking in the parking lot to retrieve a customer's vehicle when they slipped on ice and fell, resulting in a fractured collarbone, fractured ribs, and a punctured lung.

sampleRecords.event_description: Caught, entangled in running powered equipment  normal operation
sampleRecords.final_narrative: On July 31, 2024, at approximately 9:20 AM, the injured employee was standing by a conveyor and observing a process robot after employees had completed troubleshooting procedures on it. The injured employee's right hand became caught between a conveyor roller and a metal pallet, resulting in partial amputation of their little finger.

sampleRecords.employer: Honda Development & Manufacturing of America, LLC
sampleRecords.event_description: Caught or wedged between objects  nonrunning
sampleRecords.final_narrative: On July 5, 2024, at around 9:00 PM, an employee was changing a grinding wheel using a lifting device. He manually lifted the wheel to situate it in the lifting device, and when it fell into place his left middle finger became pinched between the wheel and the lifting device. The employee sustained a partial fingertip amputation.
